header.headline: Kernel Registry Flow
header.subtitle: Track how an abstract IR op resolves into a concrete runtime kernel.

ir.title: IR Operation
ir.body: Start from the canonical operator intent.

registry.title: Registry Lookup
registry.body: Match the op to a supported kernel family.

selector.title: Kernel Selector
selector.body: Choose the implementation for shape and policy.

runtime.title: Generated Runtime
runtime.body: Compile the selected kernel plan into the runtime artifact.

artifact.title: Linked Runtime
artifact.body: The final runtime uses only registered, validated kernels.

footer.note: The registry boundary is one of the clearest deterministic compiler interfaces in the repo.
